## Checklist

- [ ] The branch is based on current `main`.
- [ ] Lua syntax validation passes.
- [ ] The GitHub Actions ZIP was tested in Factorio when the change affects runtime behavior or blueprint generation.
- [ ] Player-visible changes are reflected in `changelog.txt` when preparing a release.
- [ ] `info.json` and `changelog.txt` use the same version when this PR is intended to release.
- [ ] Existing release tags are not moved or recreated.
